title: Update your Medeffect e-notice preferences - Thank you - Canada.ca
content:
## Update Your Medeffect e-Notice Preferences - Thank you
This message confirms that your demographic information has been updated.
If you wish to unsubscribe from this mailing list, please visit the MedEffect e-Notice web page.
For all other enquiries, contact us at hc.MedEffect.Notice-Avis.MedEffet.sc@canada.ca .
